description: Etrian Odyssey is a dungeon crawler RPG first developed by Atlus in 2007 on the Nintendo DS.

v0.1.0.description:
# v0.1.0 [Alpha]

This version is compatible with Archipelago 0.6.7 or greater.

Report any issues to the Etrian Odyssey (DS) channel in the AP discord server.

For setup instructions, visit [the setup guide](https://github.com/TheMasterZelda/Etrian_Odyssey_1_Archipelago/blob/master/docs/setup_en.md).

This version requires the [patcher version v0.1.0](https://github.com/TheMasterZelda/etrian-odyssey-1-archipelago-patcher/releases/tag/v0.1.0).

## Features

### Goals

- Defeat Fenrir
- Defeat Cernunos
- Defeat Cotrangl
- Defeat Etreant

### Items

- Consumables
- Money
- Key Items (Clear Key, Violet Key)
- Progressive Level Cap (Fixed Increase/Complete Shuffle)
- Progressive Floor Limit (Fixed Increase/Complete Shuffle)
- Class (all 9) (Vanilla/StartWithAll/ShuffleAvailability)
- Skills (ShuffleIndividually/ShuffleGroup)

### Locations

- Treasure Boxes
- Mission Completion
- Monster Codex entries
- Item Compendium entries

### Logic

- Battle Logic Mode "No Logic"
- Battle Logic Mode "Level Only"
- Battle Logic Mode "Simplified"
- Sustain Logic
- Basic Encounter Logic

### Quality Of Life

- Experience Modifier (player configured)
- Shop Unlock Material Cost Divider (player configured
- Material Sell Value Multiplier (player configured)
- Automatic Hold A for battle speed
- Faster Labyrinth walk speed
- Custom UI on the Main Menu to indicate the current level and floor cap
- Resting now cost only 1 level and can be done from level 5, down from 10 and 30 respectively

### Options

- Initial Level Cap
- Extra Progressive Level Cap Items
- Initial Floor Limit
- Extra Progressive Floor Limit Items
- Starting Class Count
- Skill Shuffling: Can toggle the shuffling of the generic stat increase skills.
- Skill Shuffling: Can toggle the shuffling of the mastery skills.
- Skill Shuffling: Can toggle the shuffling of the gathering skills.
- Skills Requirement can be removed (this affects the logic).
- Starting Skill count
- Conditional Drops can be toggled off
v0.1.0.title: v0.1.0

v0.2.0.description:
# Etrian Odyssey v0.2.0 [Alpha]

The Quest Sanity Update.

This version is compatible with Archipelago 0.6.7 or greater.

This update must be installed for both the host and the client to function properly.

Report any issues to the Etrian Odyssey (DS) channel in the AP discord server.

This version requires the [patcher version v0.2.0](https://github.com/TheMasterZelda/etrian-odyssey-1-archipelago-patcher/releases/tag/v0.2.0).

## New

- New goal: annihilate_the_forest_folk, which is a stratum 4 goal.
- Codex Sanity now support Quest Monsters.
  - Fireeater (Stratum 2+)
  - Toxinfly (Stratum 2+)
  - Omnivore (Stratum 3+)
  - Nightoad (Stratum 4+)
  - Hextoad (Stratum 4+)
  - Steelweb (Unavailable in current goals)
  - Golem (Stratum 3+)
  - Alraune (Stratum 5+)
- Codex Sanity now support the Pondclaw (Stratum 2+)
- Codex Sanity now support the Manticor (Stratum 5+)
- Codex Sanity now support every stratum 1-5 enemies!
- Compendium Sanity now support more conditional drops (Only 8 left to implement!):
  - Charcoal (Stratum 1+)
  - Carminite (Stratum 2+)
  - Old Shell (Unavailable in current goals)
  - Gem Plume (Unavailable in current goals)
  - Velvet (Stratum 5+)
  - Holed Limb (Unavailable in current goals)
  - Statue Arm (Stratum 3+)
  - Ebon Plume (Unavailable in current goals)
  - Cold Scale (Unavailable in current goals)
- New option: codex_sanity_include_quest_monsters. This is independent to quest sanity, and exclude/include codex entry locations for monster locked behind quests.
- New option: minimize_quest_material_grind. This is independent to quest sanity. Reduce all material requirement quest to only 1 of each required material. Note: This doesn't affect quests that requires shop unlocks.
- New option: Quest Sanity (see section for more info)

## Quest Sanity

- Every Quests from stratum 1 to 5 are implemented.
- Quest 09 - "Explorers Guild trial" duration is reduced from 5 days to half a day (in-game text doesn't reflect this).
- Note: Some quests are not included in their unlocked stratum goal.
- New option: quest_completion_reward_hint. When enabled, the quest description will now tell the player what the AP reward is.
- Automatic scouting: When the Quest Reward hint are enabled, the client will automatically scout those location when the player look at the quest.

## Logic Changes

- B10F Violet Crystal room logically does not require being able to survive the enemies anymore (Changed since the rooms are very small to enable earlier logical access. More similar rooms may receive the same treatment).
- Manticor now properly listed as a Boss in its region instead of a FOE.
- B17F Secret Area North Chest is now a stratum 5+ goal location (excluded from stratum 4 goal).
- Sustain Logic now use the "Effective" level cap (which reduce the expected grind based on floor progression)
- Usable skills are now determined based on the "Effective" level cap (which reduce the expected grind based on floor progression)
- Minor change on the "Can Survive Enemy" evaluation.
- The region Survival level check wasn't changed for now, since it caused issue with the secret area of B5F for stratum 1 goals.

## Fixes

- The Clear Key and Violet Key events are now removed - no more weird unexpected text when looking at their vanilla chest.
- Fixed an unintentional space in the textbox for custom items found in treasure boxes.
- The default Battle Logic Mode was changed from level_only to simplified, as it was intended to be (oops).
- Minor consistency issue on calculating usable skills, only affecting the spoiler log.

## Miscs

- Location name for Mission changed from "Mission Clear" to "Mission Completion".
v0.2.0.title: v0.2.0

v0.2.0-rc1.description:
# Etrian Odyssey v0.2.0-rc1 [Alpha]

The Quest Sanity Update.

This version is compatible with Archipelago 0.6.7 or greater.

This update must be installed for both the host and the client to function properly.

Report any issues to the Etrian Odyssey (DS) channel in the AP discord server.

This version requires the [patcher version v0.2.0-rc1](https://github.com/TheMasterZelda/etrian-odyssey-1-archipelago-patcher/releases/tag/v0.2.0-rc1).

## New

- New goal: annihilate_the_forest_folk, which is a stratum 4 goal.
- Codex Sanity now support Quest Monsters.
  - Fireeater (Stratum 2+)
  - Toxinfly (Stratum 2+)
  - Omnivore (Stratum 3+)
  - Nightoad (Stratum 4+)
  - Hextoad (Stratum 4+)
  - Steelweb (Unavailable in current goals)
  - Golem (Stratum 3+)
  - Alraune (Stratum 5+)
- Codex Sanity now support the Pondclaw (Stratum 2+)
- Codex Sanity now support the Manticor (Stratum 5+)
- Codex Sanity now support every stratum 1-5 enemies!
- Compendium Sanity now support more conditional drops (Only 8 left to implement!):
  - Charcoal (Stratum 1+)
  - Carminite (Stratum 2+)
  - Old Shell (Unavailable in current goals)
  - Gem Plume (Unavailable in current goals)
  - Velvet (Stratum 5+)
  - Holed Limb (Unavailable in current goals)
  - Statue Arm (Stratum 3+)
  - Ebon Plume (Unavailable in current goals)
  - Cold Scale (Unavailable in current goals)
- New option: codex_sanity_include_quest_monsters. This is independent to quest sanity, and exclude/include codex entry locations for monster locked behind quests.
- New option: minimize_quest_material_grind. This is independent to quest sanity. Reduce all material requirement quest to only 1 of each required material. Note: This doesn't affect quests that requires shop unlocks.
- New option: Quest Sanity (see section for more info)

## Quest Sanity

- Every Quests from stratum 1 to 5 are implemented.
- Quest 09 - "Explorers Guild trial" duration is reduced from 5 days to half a day (in-game text doesn't reflect this).
- Note: Some quests are not included in their unlocked stratum goal.
- New option: quest_completion_reward_hint. When enabled, the quest description will now tell the player what the AP reward is.
- Automatic scouting: When the Quest Reward hint are enabled, the client will automatically scout those location when the player look at the quest.

## Logic Changes

- B10F Violet Crystal room logically does not require being able to survive the enemies anymore (Changed since the rooms are very small to enable earlier logical access. More similar rooms may receive the same treatment).
- Manticor now properly listed as a Boss in its region instead of a FOE.
- B17F Secret Area North Chest is now a stratum 5+ goal location (excluded from stratum 4 goal).
- Sustain Logic now use the "Effective" level cap (which reduce the expected grind based on floor progression)
- Usable skills are now determined based on the "Effective" level cap (which reduce the expected grind based on floor progression)
- Minor change on the "Can Survive Enemy" evaluation.
- The region Survival level check wasn't changed for now, since it caused issue with the secret area of B5F for stratum 1 goals.

## Fixes

- The Clear Key and Violet Key events are now removed - no more weird unexpected text when looking at their vanilla chest.
- Fixed an unintentional space in the textbox for custom items found in treasure boxes.
- The default Battle Logic Mode was changed from level_only to simplified, as it was intended to be (oops).
- Minor consistency issue on calculating usable skills, only affecting the spoiler log.

## Miscs

- Location name for Mission changed from "Mission Clear" to "Mission Completion".

v0.3.0.description:
# Etrian Odyssey v0.3.0 [Alpha]

The PAIN AND SUFFERING Update.

This version is compatible with Archipelago 0.6.7 or greater.

This update must be installed for both the host and the client to function properly.

Report any issues to the Etrian Odyssey (DS) channel in the AP discord server.

This version requires the [patcher version v0.3.0](https://github.com/TheMasterZelda/etrian-odyssey-1-archipelago-patcher/releases/tag/v0.3.0).

## New

- New goals: 
  - Defeat Primevil: Postgame superboss of the 6th stratum.
  - Fully Complete Codex And Compendium: Why? I am legally not responsible if you pick this option.
- Shop Unlock Sanity (default off)
- New Location Type: Shop Item Unlock (Shop Unlock Sanity)
- New option: Shuffle Radha Note (default off)
- Codex Sanity now support additional monsters:
  - Flamegel (Stratum 6)
  - Hazefly (Stratum 6)
  - Hellfly (Stratum 6)
  - Blader (Stratum 6)
  - Monocyte (Stratum 6)
  - Largeant (Stratum 6)
  - Red Cell (Stratum 6)
  - Evilroot (Stratum 6)
  - Rockwood (Stratum 6)
  - Metalion (Stratum 6)
  - Lucifird (Stratum 6)
  - Ironcrab (Stratum 6)
  - Steelweb (Stratum 6)
  - Songbird (Stratum 6)
  - Shellord (Stratum 6)
  - Macabre (Stratum 6)
  - Wyrmoid (Stratum 6)
  - Drakoid (Stratum 6)
  - Dragoid (Stratum 6)
  - Teralich (Stratum 6)
  - Etreant (Stratum 6)
  - Wyrm (Stratum 6)
  - Drake (Stratum 6)
  - Dragon (Stratum 6)
  - Clover (Stratum 6)
  - Primevil (Stratum 6)
- Codex Sanity now support every enemies!
- Compendium Sanity now support more conditional drops:
  - Tough Fang (Stratum 6)
  - Silver Eye (Stratum 4)
  - Evil Scale (Stratum 6)
  - Evil Crest (Stratum 6)
  - Beast Eye (Stratum 5)
  - Harvester (Stratum 5)
  - Vine Whip (Stratum 5)
  - Rose Whip (Stratum 5)
- Compendium Sanity now support stratum 6 materials
- Compendium Sanity now support every material drops!
- Every Stratum 6 quest are supported for Quest Sanity.

## Logic Changes

- Minor adjustment on how battle logic get calculated for Cruella and Diabolix.

## Fixes

- Automatic Location Scouting for Quest now works properly for quest further than the fifth one in the list.
- Generation failure caused by specific combination of settings related to Alraune Codex entry.
v0.3.0.title: v0.3.0

v0.3.1.description:
# Etrian Odyssey v0.3.1 [Beta]

Small hotfix.

This version is compatible with Archipelago 0.6.7 or greater.

The host does not need to install this version. Game generated with 0.3.0 are compatible with this. Only patching and the client are changed.
Report any issues to the Etrian Odyssey (DS) channel in the AP discord server.

This version requires the [patcher version v0.3.1](https://github.com/TheMasterZelda/etrian-odyssey-1-archipelago-patcher/releases/tag/v0.3.1).

## Fixes

- Client bug causing inventory items to be skipped under specific circumstance when the item reception buffer got full.
- Quest 09 (Explorers Guild Trial) custom event playing on every tiles.
v0.3.1.title: v0.3.1

v0.4.0.description:
# Etrian Odyssey v0.4.0 [Beta]

The UT and Skill Update.

This version is compatible with Archipelago 0.6.7 or greater.

This update must be installed for both the host and the client to function properly.

Report any issues to the Etrian Odyssey (DS) channel in the AP discord server.

This version requires the [patcher version v0.4.0](https://github.com/TheMasterZelda/etrian-odyssey-1-archipelago-patcher/releases/tag/v0.4.0).

## New

- Universal Tracker Glitched Logic support. In the context of this game, glitched logic remove sustain and battle logic.
- Universal Tracker yaml-less support
- Merged the option `remove_skills_requirements` with the new option.
- Added the new option `skill_requirement_shuffle`. It has the following values:
  - **Vanilla:** Vanilla Requirements. Nothing is changed.
  - **Remove:** Removes the skills requirement from the game. This mean that every skill are learnable by themselves from level 1 (if unlocked).
  - **Level Shuffle:** The required skills are kept the same, but the level requirement are randomized.
  - **Non-Root Shuffle with Mastery retention:** All non-base skills requirements are randomized, retaining the mastery trees.
  - **Non-Root Shuffle:** All non-base skills requirements are randomized without retaining the mastery trees.
  - **Full Shuffle with Mastery retention:** All skills requirements are randomized, retaining the mastery trees.
  - **Full Shuffle:** All skills requirements are randomized without retaining the mastery trees.**
  - **Chaos:** All skills requirements are randomized. Mastery are not prioritized as primary requirement. No chain dependency limit.

## Fixes

- Automatic Quest Reward Scouting crashing the client under specific circumstances
- Improved reliability for Clear Key and Violet Key special flag handling.

## Misc

- Major Logic Engine refactoring. This fixed most potential generation problems, and improved generation performances.
v0.4.0.title: v0.4.0
